name: Lion’s Mane
summary: Traditional herbal medicine with emerging evidence supporting therapeutic applications.
description: Traditional herbal medicine with emerging evidence supporting therapeutic applications.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated when used appropriately; review interactions and contraindications.

claimMap.claim: v9.8: Lion's mane is promising but evidence is still small/emerging; keep below bacopa/citicoline for cognition.
claimMap.notes: v9.8: Lion's mane is promising but evidence is still small/emerging; keep below bacopa/citicoline for cognition.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 1–3 g/day fruiting-body powder or extract-equivalent in small human trials; product-specific dosing matters

safety: Generally well tolerated for most users.
